CustomField.description: Benchmark rent that would be expected for this aircraft [LOAD:No] [JUSTIFICATION: Deprecated this field] [REPLACEMENT OBJECT API: Not needed as this field is not being used] [REPLACEMENT FIELD API: Not needed as this field is not being used] [COMMENTS: Asana link https://app.asana.com/1/7934919496419/project/1211557698320453/task/1210539422112047?focus=true Reason: The field is not being used anywhere in the system. Hence we are deprecating this field to clean up the system Release version: v60]
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Desired rent used as a guide by commercial teams. Once set, any marketing campaign including this asset will use this as the "Benchmark" rent while re-marketing.
CustomField.label: Z_Unused_2602 Benchmark Rent
